title: Add spaced-repetition scoring (SM-2)
description: Cards currently have no learning curve — pickRandomCard is purely random. Add a per-card `ease` (default 2.5) and `intervalDays` (default 0) field, plus a `POST /api/cards/:id/review` endpoint that accepts grade ∈ {again, hard, good, easy} and updates both fields using the SM-2 formula. Add a `due` field and have `pickRandomCard` prefer due cards over random. Don't break the existing addCard / pickRandomCard semantics; the change must be pure-additive (existing cards keep working, they just get a default ease+interval on first read).

title: Multi-deck support
description: Currently `Deck.cards` is a flat list. Add a top-level `Decks` collection keyed by id, with each deck carrying its own name + cards. Update deck.ts to operate on a single `data/decks.json` and add endpoints `GET /api/decks`, `POST /api/decks`, `GET /api/decks/:id/cards`, etc. Keep the default deck (`id: default`) as the bootstrap so existing data/deck.json users don't lose their cards.

title: CLI: persist review state between sessions
description: `src/cli.ts` currently forgets which cards have been seen the moment the process exits. Persist `seen` to a `.clistate` JSON file at session end, restore it at session start. Reset the file when the user grades 'again' — those cards should be due immediately.
